title: hieracium murorum subsp. firmifrons
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. firmifrons, also known as the wall hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. firmifrons include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even act as a natural antiseptic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by drying the leaves and flowers and steeping them in hot water.
